svg.title: MeshChat concurrency risk map
svg.desc: Diagram showing buffer overflow, deadlock, and data race risk points across the MeshChat stack

g.text: PayloadCallback.onPayloadReceived — not a coroutine, cannot suspend
RISK-1: tryEmit drops if buffer full
RISK-4: Mutex + IDS callback = nested lock
RISK-5: sequential send blocks on slow peer — head-of-line blocking
RISK-6: concurrent inserts from mesh + UI = SQLiteLockedException
RISK-7: Node scope outlives service — coroutine leak, channels never closed
